name: codex-zh-localizer
description: Unofficial local Chinese metadata localizer for Codex plugins and plugin details.

scripts.check: node --check bin/codex-zh.mjs && node --check bin/codex-zh-audit.mjs && node --check bin/codex-zh-smoke-test.mjs && node --check bin/codex-plugin-marketplace-zh.mjs && node --check bin/codex-plugin-components-zh.mjs
